summary: Owner approved the AG Digitalz Manual Posting Pack v1 sprint for manual owner use only.
notes: The approval allowed static app updates, target PR review and merge if clean, redeploy of the existing dedicated Netlify staging-only site, and AG OS proof records. It did not approve OAuth, account connection, credentials, automated posting, scheduling, analytics API use, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
